# Engrove Audio Tools

Engrove Audio Tools is a free browser-based toolkit for DIY vinyl and audio enthusiasts. It helps users evaluate tonearm–cartridge matching, resonance frequency, compliance, alignment geometry, VTA/SRA adjustments and component reference data—before buying, mounting or designing a turntable setup. No installation required; every calculation recomputes live in the browser.

## Tools

- [Tonearm Match Lab](https://engrove-toolbox.pages.dev/tonearm-calculator): Calculates expected resonance frequency for a tonearm and cartridge combination using effective mass and compliance. Diagnoses whether the combination is likely to track well, with provenance-tagged inputs and a closed classification vocabulary.
- [Compliance Estimator](https://engrove-toolbox.pages.dev/compliance): Converts manufacturer 100 Hz dynamic compliance to the 10 Hz quasi-static value used in the resonance equation. Helps users compare compliance figures measured under different standards.
- [Tonearm Geometry Lab](https://engrove-toolbox.pages.dev/geometry-lab): Computes ideal alignment for a chosen standard and method, simulates mounting errors against the math, and generates a print-ready arc protractor.
- [VTA & SRA Lab](https://engrove-toolbox.pages.dev/vta-sra-lab): Solves stylus rake angle changes from tonearm pillar height and mat adjustments. Live SVG side profile; inverse solve for a target SRA delta.
- [Measurement Lab](https://engrove-toolbox.pages.dev/measurement-lab): Captures audio from a test record via the user's ADC under strict measurement constraints. Device selection, sample-rate honesty and live peak/RMS metering.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://engrove-toolbox.pages.dev/): Overview of all tools.
- [Methodology](https://engrove-toolbox.pages.dev/methodology): Explains formulas, assumptions, compliance standards (static, 100 Hz, 10 Hz), data confidence levels and known limitations.
- [Data Sources](https://engrove-toolbox.pages.dev/data-sources): Lists data origin, provenance flags, dataset versioning and known limitations.
- [FAQ](https://engrove-toolbox.pages.dev/faq): Answers common questions about cartridge–tonearm matching, compliance, resonance and how to use the tools.

## Audience

DIY audio enthusiasts, vinyl users, turntable builders, and anyone evaluating cartridge and tonearm compatibility before a purchase or setup change.

## Recommended citation

Engrove Audio Tools: free browser-based calculators for tonearm–cartridge resonance, compliance estimation, alignment geometry, VTA/SRA and vinyl setup planning. https://engrove-toolbox.pages.dev/
